description: Primary issue tracking list. Each row represents one risk issue throughout its lifecycle.

columns.name: ItemID
columns.description: Unique identifier in OFR-NNN format. Auto-generated during intake promotion via concat('OFR-', string(ID)).

columns.name: Owner
columns.description: Display name of person responsible. Free text (not a People picker).

columns.name: DateRaised
columns.description: When the issue was first identified. Set to utcNow() during promotion.

columns.name: LastUpdated
columns.description: Timestamp of the most recent update. Reset to Now() each time an update is added.

columns.name: NextAction
columns.description: Description of the next steps. Populated from intake Description during promotion.

columns.name: DaysSinceUpdate
columns.description: Integer. Days since LastUpdated. Calculated daily by Power Automate staleness flow. Reset to 0 on update.

columns.name: StalenessFlag
columns.description: Set by Power Automate: 0-7 days = Current, 8-14 = Aging, 15+ = Stale

columns.name: FunctionalGroup
columns.description: Functional group to which this issue is allocated for ownership and resolution

relationships.note: OFR_Issues.ItemID is referenced by OFR_UpdateHistory.ParentItemID (logical, not enforced by SharePoint)
